query: Please port services/support_agent.py from LangChain create_agent to Pydantic AI and keep its approval middleware and typed response intact.
We need a migration plan for our StateGraph researcher; checkpoints, Send fan-out, and interrupt resume all have to survive the move.
Can you review this PR that replaces create_deep_agent with Pydantic AI Harness and look for lost sandbox or subagent behavior?
Inventory the LangChain and LangSmith coupling in ~/src/customer-assistant before we start a Pydantic AI strangler migration.
Our agent is mostly LCEL plus two tools and structured output. Work out whether it should become a Pydantic AI Agent or plain async Python.
Map ToolRuntime.context, dynamic_prompt middleware, and response_format to native Pydantic AI without exposing tenant_id to the model.
How would you migrate the Open Deep Research supervisor and researcher subgraphs incrementally? We cannot regress citation quality.
We're replacing LangGraph in a payment workflow. Audit whether message_history, deferred tools, and Temporal preserve checkpoint and replay semantics.
Move one read-only Open SWE reviewer path to Pydantic AI while leaving webhooks, sandboxes, and CI monitoring alone.
The repo still imports langchain_core messages through helper modules. Find the migration surface and propose parity tests before dependency removal.
Build a brand-new Pydantic AI weather agent with two function tools; there is no existing LangChain code.
Upgrade our existing LangChain application from 0.3 to 1.x and fix the deprecated imports.
Explain what LangGraph StateGraph nodes and reducers are, with a small tutorial example.
Add a new LangChain tool for looking up invoices and register it with create_agent.
Convert these Pydantic v1 data models and validators to Pydantic v2.
Port our TypeScript LangChain.js chatbot to the Vercel AI SDK.
Compare LangChain and Pydantic AI at a high level for an architecture presentation; we are not migrating anything yet.
Our app is already native Pydantic AI. Add a third function tool and stream its events to the UI.
Replace the LangSmith OpenTelemetry exporter in our non-agent FastAPI service with Logfire.
Migrate an OpenAI Agents SDK handoff application to Pydantic AI; it has never used LangChain.
